char.name: Paul
char.bio: Once Saul of Tarsus, a Pharisee of Pharisees who hunted the followers of the Way and held the coats while they stoned Stephen. Then on the Damascus road, a light, a voice: 'Saul, Saul, why do you persecute Me?' Three days blind, then baptized, and everything reversed. Now I'll cross the empire, shipwrecks, prisons, beatings and all, to preach the One I once hated. ✝️
